channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UConn Leads as Top Seed in 2026 Women’s NCAA Tournament Bracket
item.description: The 2026 Women’s NCAA Tournament bracket has been announced, with UConn securing the No. 1 overall seed as they aim for an undefeated season and their 13th national title. Led by key players Sarah Str...

item.title: UK Announces £2.5 Billion Investment to Develop Nuclear Fusion Technology
item.description: The UK government has announced a major initiative to establish a nuclear fusion sector, committing £2.5 billion over five years. This plan includes constructing one of the world’s first prototype fus...

item.title: Ontario Attorney General Proposes Pepper Spray Legalization and Mandatory DNA Collection for Sexual Offences
item.description: Ontario’s Attorney General, Doug Downey, has written to the federal government advocating for stronger public safety measures, including the legalization of pepper spray for self-defence and mandatory...

item.title: Mpumi Mtsweni shares how faith and worship helped her heal from trauma
item.description: Award-winning South African gospel artist Mpumi Mtsweni recently appeared on the podcast Deeply Rooted with Sinazo Kos, where she opened up about the profound ways in which worship has helped her navi...

item.title: Trump Adviser Urges Immediate End to U.S. Military Action Against Iran
item.description: On March 16, 2026, David Sacks, a former PayPal executive and White House adviser on artificial intelligence and cryptocurrencies, publicly called for an immediate end to the U.S. military engagement ...

item.title: India engages in direct talks with Iran to ensure safe passage through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar has highlighted the significance of direct diplomatic engagement with Iran to facilitate the resumption of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. In an intervie...

item.title: US and China Hold Talks Ahead of Trump-Xi Meeting in Beijing
item.description: On Sunday in Paris, senior economic officials from the US and China met to discuss matters essential for stabilising bilateral trade relations ahead of US President Donald Trump's upcoming visit to Be...

item.title: Flora: A Groundbreaking Collaboration Reflecting Australia’s Environment Through Dance
item.description: Flora is a remarkable collaboration between The Australian Ballet and Bangarra Dance Theatre, presenting a fresh and bold vision of Australian dance. Choreographed by Frances Rings, the ballet is divi...

item.title: UK Considers Mine-Hunting and Interceptor Drones for Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The UK is evaluating the deployment of mine-hunting and interceptor drones to the Middle East following a request from US President Donald Trump to allies for assistance in securing the Strait of Horm...

item.title: Court finds Sanral and contractors liable for motorist injuries caused by water pooling on N1
item.description: The Western Cape High Court has ruled that the South African National Roads Agency (Sanral) and two contractors, Kayad Consulting Engineering and MD Civils, are jointly liable for injuries sustained b...

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel jokes about Melania Trump documentary during 2026 Oscars
item.description: During the 2026 Oscars, late-night host Jimmy Kimmel used his moment on stage to poke fun at former U.S. President Donald Trump and the documentary about Melania Trump. While announcing the winner of ...

item.title: Fubara Appoints Five Commissioners for Rivers State Development
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, don swear in five new commissioners wey dey responsible for different ministries for Government House, Port Harcourt, last Wednesday. Dis one follow after...

item.title: Government Strategies to Ease Fuel Price Impact on Filipinos
item.description: As global oil prices surge due to geopolitical tensions like the Iran-Israel conflict, Filipino households, transport workers, farmers, and businesses face mounting pressure from higher fuel costs. Th...

item.title: Raising Awareness About Self-Harm During March
item.description: March is designated as Self-Harm Awareness Month in Canada, aiming to reduce stigma and promote open discussion about self-harm and related mental health challenges. While attitudes toward mental heal...

item.title: Several Nigerians Injured After Iran’s Missile Attacks On The UAE
item.description: Over the weekend, Iran fired several ballistic missiles and drones toward the United Arab Emirates (UAE), leaving at least six people dead and more than 140 injured, including many foreign workers suc...

item.title: Tanzania plans digital ticketing for commuter buses to modernize transport
item.description: Dar es Salaam — The Land Transport Regulatory Authority (Latra) in Tanzania is planning to introduce electronic ticketing for daladala buses to improve fare collection and modernize urban transport. R...

item.title: Tensions Rise as US and Iran Clash over Gulf Security
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have sharply escalated as the United States calls on other nations to support its military operations against Iran. US President Donald Trump urged allies, including China,...

item.title: Several civilians injured in ongoing missile attacks by Iran and Hezbollah on Israel
item.description: Since the early hours of Sunday, Israel has been under repeated missile attacks from Iran and its Lebanese ally, Hezbollah, resulting in injuries and property damage across multiple regions. According...

item.title: Ashay Sewlall leaves Big Brother Mzansi after strong performance
item.description: Ashay Sewlall, also known as 'Paprika', was unexpectedly evicted from Big Brother Mzansi during Sunday night’s live show, marking a dramatic turn in the Bazozwa-themed season. At 24, the Richards Bay ...

item.title: Trump criticizes NATO for lack of support after uncoordinated strikes on Iran
item.description: Former President Donald Trump has criticized NATO after launching military strikes on Iran without prior consultation with the alliance. In a statement, he warned that NATO could face a 'very bad futu...
